ogTitle: Koonawarra vs Koonyum Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Koonawarra and Koonyum Range.
heading: Koonawarra vs Koonyum Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Koonawarra, New South Wales and Koonyum Range, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Koonyum Range has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Koonawarra (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Koonawarra or Koonyum Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Koonawarra has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Koonyum Range scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Koonawarra scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Koonyum Range scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Koonawarra or Koonyum Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Koonyum Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
